name: third-audience
description: Skills for third-audience-mdx — make your Next.js MDX site discoverable by AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini). Setup, route management, and bot detection debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Make your MDX site discoverable by AI crawlers — setup, routes, and bot analytics
interface.longDescription: For two decades, websites served two audiences: humans and search engines. AI agents are the third. This plugin provides skills to set up third-audience-mdx in your Next.js project, add missing AI route handlers, and debug bot detection when visits aren't being tracked.
defaultPrompt: Set up third-audience-mdx in my Next.js project.
Why aren't bot visits being tracked?
